title: Algae (disambiguation)
content:
'''Algae''' could refer to:

*'''[[Algae/Legends|Algae]]''', a plant.
**'''[[Bestrum algae]]''', a species of algae.
**'''[[Glower|Glower "algae"]]''', a species of algae.
*'''[[Algae-bread]]''', a food.
*'''[[Algae cylinder]]''', an air filter used aboard starships.
*'''[[Algae sugar]]''', an extract from algae.
*'''[[Algae Sward]]''', a sea on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

{{Disambig}}
